title: Cosmic Game
definition: The universe seen as an infinite, self-generative, playful and learning entity that creates and resets its own rules and experiences.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Imagining the universe as a game where everything happens because it's part of an ongoing cosmic adventure.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A perspective on the universe as a dynamic, self-aware system that evolves and learns through creating, experiencing, and forgetting different realities.
difficulty_levels.expert: An interpretation of existence as a recursive, generative playground where the universe learns from every instance, using creativity, chaos, and self-reflection to shape its own destiny.

extra_fields.insight: The universe is seen not only as an observer but also as a participant in the cosmic game it creates.
